message:
fix(web): eliminate username validation duplication and fix avatar edge case

Bug fixes for user profile pages:

1. Remove duplicated username validation code from page.tsx and route.ts
   - Both files now import isValidUsername from @/lib/username.ts
   - Uses the more comprehensive reserved usernames list (includes "root",
     "system", "moderator", "mod", "staff", etc.)
   - Single source of truth for validation logic

2. Fix UserAvatar edge case for empty display names
   - Add .trim() to handle whitespace-only names
   - Add .filter() to remove empty segments from split
   - Add fallback "?" if no valid initials can be extracted

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
